title: Junior Business Development Manager at Square Yards

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Square Yards
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
